data.raceName: LADBROKES BIG BETS COPY MAIDEN HEAT 3
data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. FEDERAL MERCURY makes her debut without a trial but profiles well for first outing. Expected to measure up. 2. REEL'EM AISHA was safely held on debut when seventh (18.53) at this track over 300m. Meets a moderate line up and should do much better. 1. TIGER SPOON struggling for winning form, but gets every chance from the inside. Last time finished 6th on January 21 over 300m at this track behind Lipschitz beaten 7 lengths (18.20) in a Maiden. Solid formlines coming through his last run. In the mix. 7. BULLEN ROAD makes debut for the Mark Knowles kennel. Start all important and will need some luck getting across from the wide draw. Profiles nicely and can feature in the finish.","runners":[8,2,1,7],"exclusive":false}
